name: github-pr-review-inline
description: AI-powered GitHub PR review with inline comments (text format)

config.prompt:
Review this git diff and provide feedback:

{{steps.get_diff.diff}}

Focus on:
1. Code quality and best practices
2. Potential bugs or issues
3. Security concerns
4. Performance implications

Provide specific, actionable feedback in format: 'path/to/file.go:42 - issue description'
config.system: You are a senior code reviewer. Provide constructive, specific feedback on code changes.
